allow: Bash(node -e "const t=require\('./node_modules/expo/tsconfig.base.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(t.compilerOptions?.types ?? 'no types field', null, 0\)\); console.log\('lib:', JSON.stringify\(t.compilerOptions?.lib ?? 'default'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const v=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('vercel.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('valid ✓'\); console.log\('top-level keys:', Object.keys\(v\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('routes count:', v.routes.length\); v.routes.forEach\(\(r,i\)=>console.log\('  ['+i+']', r.handle?\('handle='+r.handle\):\('src='+r.src+\(r.dest?\(' -> '+r.dest\):''\)+\(r.status?\(' \('+r.status+'\)'\):''\)+\(r.continue?' [continue]':''\)\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const v=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('vercel.json','utf8'\)\); const bad=['rewrites','redirects','headers','cleanUrls','trailingSlash'].filter\(k=>k in v\); console.log\(bad.length? \('KONFLIK: '+bad.join\(','\)\) : 'tidak ada konflik ✓'\);")
